name: task-review
description: Example declarative extension that combines task metadata, sidebar review context, and safe Markdown transforms for reviewing agent task work.

permissions.reason: Reads local Markdown task items, tags, and frontmatter fields already available to Forge.
Writes bounded checklist and line-order transforms into the current review note when requested.

contributes.label: Task review metadata
contributes.description: Declares task, tag, and frontmatter fields useful for reviewing agent work and open follow-ups.

contributes.label: Task summary
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported task summary sidebar widget for review notes.

contributes.label: Properties
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported frontmatter sidebar widget for review state, owner, and status fields.

contributes.label: Convert findings to checklist
contributes.description: Declares the supported checklist transform for turning review findings into follow-up tasks.

contributes.label: Sort review lines
contributes.description: Declares the supported line sorting transform for grouping review notes before handoff.
